title: Dudelange、Esch-sur-Alzette Canton — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Dudelange、Esch-sur-Alzette Cantonの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

DudelangeはEsch-sur-Alzette Cantonにある人口22,043の都市です。A former steel town in southern Luxembourg known for its industrial heritage, the Gëlle Fra memorial, and its proximity to the French border.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
